The '''''Maximus''''' was a [[MC80 Liberty Type Heavy Star Cruiser|MC80 ''Liberty'' type]] [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Star Cruiser]] that served in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==History==
When three [[X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wings]] from Blue Squadron were hijacked by their Imperial-programmed [[R2-series astromech droid/Legends|R2-series astromech droids]], ''Maximus'' was part of a mission to recover the ships and their pilots before they could be delivered to the ''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer ''Invincible''. Three Y-wings from Red Squadron disabled the stolen X-wings, allowing shuttles to deliver clean R2 units and the pilots to take control of their ships and fly them to the waiting ''Maximus''.

Later, the ''Maximus'' was sent, along with the [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighter]] ''[[Ojai]]'' to [[Attack on the Phoenix|rendezvous]] with the stolen freighter [[Phoenix (BFF-1 bulk freighter)|''Phoenix'']] in a quiet area, away from Imperial interests, in order to recover some stolen communications satellites. It arrived just as [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]] finished clearing the area of TIE starfighters launched during a surprise attack by the ''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer [[Intrepid (Imperial I-class)|''Intrepid'']]. The ''Intrepid'' fled shortly after the ''Maximus'' arrived and the ''Ojai'' docked with the ''Phoenix'' to recover the satellites. The satellites were later deployed by the [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] ''[[Jeffrey]]'' and proved essential in discovering the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star I]] project, intercepting an Imperial transmission and relaying it to the Rebel outpost [[AX-235]].

After the destruction of the Death Star, the ''Maximus'' was the first victim of the new Imperial vengeful offensive, and was destroyed by the [[Nihil (Imperial-class)|''Nihil'']] after a savage series of missile volleys from its [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE/sa bomber]] squadrons. Survivors, however, managed to escape and were [[Defense of the Anvil|collected]] by the Nebulon-B Frigate [[Anvil (EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate)|''Anvil'']].
